nav.zellePaymentPending: Please wait for your Zelle payment verification before starting a new process.

company.title: Company
company.description: MatriculaUSA is the leading platform for international students who want to study in the United States. We make the entire application, enrollment, and scholarship process easier at American universities, offering technology, expert support, and exclusive opportunities to turn your international dream into reality.

newsletter.title: Stay Updated
newsletter.description: Get the latest scholarship opportunities and news

invalidLink.title: Invalid Link
invalidLink.message: The unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired.

alreadyUnsubscribed.title: Already Unsubscribed
alreadyUnsubscribed.message: You are already unsubscribed from MatriculaUSA newsletter emails.

success.title: Successfully Unsubscribed
success.message: You have been successfully removed from our newsletter list. You will no longer receive campaign emails from MatriculaUSA.
success.important: Important: You will still receive important emails about your account, applications, and payment confirmations.
success.reactivate: If you change your mind, you can reactivate your subscription by contacting us.

error.title: Error
error.message: An error occurred while processing your request. Please try again later.

form.title: Unsubscribe from Newsletter
form.question: Are you sure you want to stop receiving campaign emails from MatriculaUSA?
form.reasonHelp: Your feedback helps us improve our services
form.note: Note: You will still receive important emails about your account, applications, and payment confirmations.
form.disclaimer: By unsubscribing, you will no longer receive campaign emails, but you will continue to receive important emails about your account and applications.

errors.tokenMissing: Token or user ID not provided

errors.processErrorRetry: Error processing unsubscribe request. Please try again.
